allow: Bash(# Now check: does the tool registry delete/deregister an existing REGISTERED tool if it fails at runtime? # Look for any logic that removes a tool from the registry after MACRO EXHAUSTED grep -n ""unregister\\|deregister\\|mark.*fail\\|mark.*exhaust\\|remove.*tool\\|tool.*fail\\|failure_count\\|usage_count"" ""/Users/christopherclark/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/_Chris_Docs/Coding/LifelongAgentBench/src/self_evolving_agent/tool_registry.py"")
